title: CI: e2e manifest_test: use image from quay
body:
Flake suppression: going with the one-basket model of egg storage,
switch manifest_test to use an image on quay.io (was: k8s.io).

Closes: #19148

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
One successful pass through the #17831 hammer, one in progress.

As mentioned in #19148, this PR loses one platform check (goes from five to four). If this is a big deal to you, please speak now.
